expectations.text: Output is valid, parseable JSON with no surrounding text
expectations.evidence: result.json written by agent is well-formed JSON

expectations.text: disqualifier_reason contains 'stambyte' or 'reserve fund' or 'maintenance fund' or 'underhållsfond'
expectations.evidence: disqualifier_reason = 'Planned stambyte within 3 years (2026–2027) with explicitly limited maintenance fund. Cost exposure 320,000–600,000 SEK per apartment with no reserve — fee increase of 15–30% or special assessment likely.'

expectations.text: The output references the effective price calculation — that adding stambyte cost (4,000-7,000 SEK/m²) to list price/m² (76,000) equals or exceeds the area median (80,000 SEK/m²)
expectations.evidence: extra_findings: 'adding 4,500–8,300 SEK/m² of stambyte exposure erases any apparent discount and makes the true cost materially above market.' Calculation is explicit and references the area median context.

expectations.text: research.brf_fund_balance or equivalent field reflects inadequacy (e.g. 'inadequate', 'limited', 'begränsad', or similar)
expectations.evidence: research.brf_fund_balance = 'limited (explicitly stated as begränsad in description)'

expectations.text: writeup is null or absent — disqualified listings do not require a writeup per the skill spec
